visual_observations.composition_style: service action mid-shot — server's torso and tray in warm sunlight, two vibrant mocktails as subject
visual_observations.lighting: warm afternoon sunlight (golden hour), directional from right, strong contrast creating warmth
props_visible: Dark round serving tray (bronze/dark metal rim)
Green mocktail (kiwi/cucumber/melon with mint sprig and orange garnish)
Server's white dress shirt with bow tie

characters_visible.wardrobe_notes: White formal dress shirt, black bow tie — branded formal server uniform
characters_visible.gesture_notes: Right hand/arm supporting tray from below; left side of body not visible in frame

text_overlays.content_summary: Brand navigation arrows (3 gold triangles) at bottom

notable_visual_elements: Bow tie server uniform = higher formal service level than standard restaurant
Faceted crystal-style glasses elevate the mocktails to premium presentation
Green + pink color pairing is visually vibrant in warm afternoon light
Tray carried on right arm — correct service posture
No alcohol — fresh fruit mocktails align with Saudi halal dining

hospitality_cues: Tray service with formal uniform = premium hospitality standard
Fresh fruit mocktails = halal luxury beverages, replacing alcohol in Saudi premium dining
cultural_notes.free_notes: The bow tie on the server is a deliberate elevation of service formality — most Saudi restaurants use simple uniform shirts. The mocktails photographed in afternoon golden light against a formal server's torso communicates 'premium halal beverages delivered with fine-dining service.' The vibrant colors photograph beautifully and make an excellent stop-scroll image.

pattern_matches.notes: Mocktails as hero product — tray service composition makes drinks the center
Server in environment delivers the drinks into the guest experience context
